# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: istio-ingressgateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway # use istio default controller
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: istio-ingressgateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: istio-ingressgateway
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: istio-ingressgateway
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: bookinfo
spec:
  hosts:
  - "bookinfo.example.com" # specify a specific domain instead of 'star'
  gateways:
    - istio-ingressgateway # which gateway to use
  http:
    # match all requests for the /reviews path, regardless of host or other headers
    - match:
      - uri:
          prefix: /reviews
      route:
        # send all matching requests here
      - destination:
          port:
            number: 9080
          host: productpage
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: bookinfo
spec:
  host: bookinfo
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL # force mutual TLS for all traffic
  subsets:
    - labels:
        version: v1
      name: v1 # we will have v1 and v2 versions
    - labels:
        version: v2
      name: v2
